name: Stash
description: Direct-to-consumer platform for game developers with web shop, game launcher and payment processing outside Apple/Google app stores.

seo.title: Stash — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: Stash: Direct-to-consumer platform for game developers with web shop, game launcher and payment processing outside Apple/Google app stores.

when_to_use: D2C web shop for games bypassing Apple/Google platform fees
Game launcher with integrated payments outside app stores
Direct player purchases for in-game items via web checkout

pros: Web shop plus launcher pushes players off-app-store
Payment processing designed for game economies
Helps publishers escape Apple and Google fees
cons: Requires marketing effort to move players off-store
Regulatory landscape on payments is shifting
Overkill for games with small paying bases
review.verdict: Strong D2C pitch for game publishers fighting app-store fees, but only pays off with meaningful player volume.
review.best_for: Mid-size game publishers with engaged players willing to buy off-store.
review.not_for: Small studios without traffic to drive to a web shop.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
